title: hieracium fragile subsp. verlotii
intro: Hieracium fragile subsp. verlotii, also known as the fragile hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium fragile subsp. verlotii include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes due to potential interactions or side effects.
